name: Justtrack
description: SaaS marketing platform for app and game publishers to manage, analyze, and automate global user acquisition growth.

seo.title: Justtrack — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Justtrack: SaaS marketing platform for app and game publishers to manage, analyze, and automate global user acquisition growth.

when_to_use: Unified UA attribution and campaign automation for mobile game publishers
Cross-network ad spend reporting and ROAS optimization for app marketers
Automated budget reallocation based on real-time campaign performance signals
Combining organic ASO data with paid UA analytics in single growth dashboard

pros: Built by Applike with real buyer insight
cons: Adds a layer rather than replacing networks
Pricing on top of existing ad spend
review.verdict: Useful SaaS layer for UA automation, but adds cost on top of your existing ad spend.
review.best_for: Publishers spending $100k+/month on UA across many networks needing automation.
review.not_for: Small advertisers whose campaign ops load doesn't justify another SaaS fee.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
